name: No-Tomato Chili Con Carne y Frijoles
recipeIngredient: 3 Tablespoons Chili Powder, More As Needed
2 Cans Pinto Beans or Red Beans, Drained (15 or 16 oz. each)
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the meat in a Dutch oven or heavy pot. Drain excess grease and add garlic, onion, and pepper, sautéing until slightly softened.
2. Add flour, stirring and scraping the pan until very lightly browned. Add all seasonings and mix thoroughly.
3. Gradually add 4 cups of broth (or stock) or water with 4 boullion cubes. Bring to a boil and simmer about 45 minutes.
4. Add beans and return to a simmer, cooking long enough to heat the beans through (about 10 minutes). Add sufficient crushed cracker crumbs for desired consistency, being careful not to over-thicken.
5. Allow chili to sit for several hours or overnight for flavors to blend; reheat if necessary.
6. Adjust all seasonings to taste.
7. This recipe freezes very well.
